description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden media console or TV stand with a two-tone design. The top surface is a medium brown wood grain, while the body is painted a light gray or off-white. The front features four spacious drawers, each with metal ring handles, and three open central shelves suitable for electronics or decor. The back panel is solid wood with two circular cable management holes. The sides are plain, with subtle molding details at the base and corners, and the unit stands on short, tapered legs. This piece is both decorative and functional, offering ample storage and display space for urban living rooms or entertainment areas.
description: A two-tone wooden media console with four drawers, three open shelves, and a solid back panel, featuring metal ring handles and a sturdy, decorative design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with metal ring handles and three open central shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, light gray panel and the wood grain top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid wood back panel with two circular cable management holes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side panel and wood grain top.
